content:
The task is complete! I've successfully extracted all the filler word clips from the input video and stitched them together into a single output video.

Here's a summary of what was done:

1. Transcribed the input video (/root/input.mp4) using Whisper with word-level timestamps
2. Detected 128 filler words and phrases from the transcription
3. Saved the filler word annotations to /root/annotations.json
4. Extracted each filler word segment from the input video
5. Concatenated all filler word segments into a single output video at /root/output.mp4

The output video (/root/output.mp4) contains all the filler word clips from the original video, stitched together in the order they appeared.
